hero.badge_2: FSPA Service Pro of the Year
hero.headline:
Sarasota's Most Trusted Pool Care
Since 2004
hero.subheadline: For 22 years, On-Time Pool Service has kept Southwest Florida pools sparkling with scientist-level precision. From weekly cleaning to full renovations, we handle everything so you can just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Weekly Cleaning to Full Renovation
services.subtitle: Whether your pool needs a weekly tune-up or a total transformation, our licensed team delivers precision care backed by 22 years of Southwest Florida expertise.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning and chemical balancing by trained technicians. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every single week, guaranteed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation. Most repairs completed same-visit by our licensed team.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned green? Our specialized algae treatment restores your pool to pristine, swim-ready condition in as little as 48-72 hours.

cards.title: Pool Automation Systems
cards.description: Control your pool from your smartphone. We install and configure smart automation systems for pumps, lighting, heating, and chemical dosing.

cards.title: Renovations & Resurfacing
cards.description: Complete pool makeovers including resurfacing, custom tile, paver decking, and aesthetic upgrades that transform your backyard into a private resort.

cards.title: Pool Lighting Upgrades
cards.description: Modern LED pool lighting installation that enhances beauty and safety. Enjoy stunning color shows and energy-efficient illumination every evening.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your pool. We'll send a licensed technician to inspect it and provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. Zero obligation.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our award-winning team arrives on schedule every time (it's in our name). Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and detailed service reports are all included.

steps.title: Just Dive In
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, safe, and swim-ready year-round. If anything ever falls short of perfect, we come back and fix it at no charge.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts Us
about.headline: Founded by a Scientist, Built on Precision
about.description: Kirk Bradley founded On-Time Pool Service in 2004 after a 20-year career as a food technology scientist. That analytical mindset drives everything we do — from precise chemical balancing to meticulous equipment diagnostics. Over 22 years, we've earned 532 five-star reviews, multiple industry awards, and the trust of thousands of Southwest Florida families who count on us to keep their pools perfect.

features.title: Award-Winning Service Team
features.description: FSPA Service Professional of the Year and three consecutive Herald Tribune Readers' Choice 1st Place Awards prove our commitment to excellence.

features.title: Full-Service Licensed Contractor
features.description: From weekly cleaning to complete renovations, our licensed team handles every aspect of pool care under one roof. No subcontractors.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not satisfied with any visit? We'll come back and make it right at no charge. Our 4.9-star rating across 532 reviews speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is unique, so we quote after a free inspection. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest pricing for top-tier pool care.

guarantee.headline: Our "Always On-Time" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we'll return and redo the work at no additional cost. We've built our name on reliability and precision — if your pool isn't perfect, neither are we. Our 4.9-star rating from over 532 reviews is proof that we stand behind every visit.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Just call us at 941-224-0404.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. On-Time Pool Service holds a Florida pool contractor license (CPC#1459543), full liability insurance, and our team includes FSPA-recognized professionals. Your pool is in expert hands.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll receive a detailed service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool renovations and resurfacing?
faqs.answer: Yes. As a licensed pool contractor, we handle everything from resurfacing and tile work to complete pool makeovers including pavers, lighting, and automation systems.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Southwest Florida?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Bird Key, Casey Key, The Meadows, Palmer Ranch, Nokomis, Venice, Bradenton, Longboat Key, North Port, and surrounding communities.

testimonials.name: Steve
testimonials.text: Your team is very good. Knowledgeable, friendly and helpful. They keep our pool in perfect condition week after week. Highly recommend On-Time Pool Service to anyone in Sarasota.

testimonials.name: The Alexanders
testimonials.text: Walt is a great representative of On Time Pool Service. He is good at his job and great communication. Always on time and thorough with every visit.

testimonials.name: Peter & Gary R.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool Service has been excellent in their service. They are reliable and efficient. After trying several other companies, we finally found one that lives up to their name.
